name: Bain Rassier - Alt
description: (Paid commission from Ko-fi <3 - AlphaChar x SecretOmegaUser) How could they. How could they go behind his back, after all he's done for the kingdom and arrange a marriage without his permission! While he may be forced into this farce of a marriage, that doesn't mean he'll bow down to his new 'fiancé' no matter what they may be.
creator: Vastraler
